calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Ascertain Beneficiaries Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anna Michnicka for Trustee.
Ann Robbeloth appeared by telephone for Pomeroy Center.
Kent Mitchell appeared by telephone for Bethel Center.

Mr. Mitchell stated that Bethel is no longer pursuing its mission and that they are prepared to disclaim and give up their claim. Ms. Michnicka clarified that a disclaimer has not been signed, but a consent was. Ms. Robbeloth stated that she has no objection to the petition, raised the issue of the real property and asked that a status hearing be set. The Court explained that there is nothing before it regarding the real property. Given everybody's agreement, the Court granted the Petition for Order to Ascertain Beneficiaries of Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Ascertain Beneficiaries Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Continued To Mar-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
